---
title: "11 - Conducting Regression Analysis"
date: 2024-05-29
description: "This notebook goes over the theory surrounding linear regressions, as well as how to implement univariate and multivariate regressions in Stata. We dig into coefficient interpretation, and we touch upon control variable selection."
categories: [econ 490, pystata, regression, univariate regression, multiple regression, estimates, coefficients, controls, interpretation]
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=11_Linear_Reg.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](11_Linear_Reg.html).
